problem id: 6ae30806
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01001010 -> 00001101
  10110110 -> 10000011
  10101110 -> 11101111
  01001011 -> 00001001
  01100100 -> 10100010
  00010101 -> 01011110
  11000110 -> 01111011
  01011000 -> 01001100
  00000100 -> 00010010
  10110111 -> 10000111

query: 10011010
predicted answer: 00100101
